name: The Trial of Fertility
description:
NTR - Avoidable (maybe)

Your fiancée must have sex with another man to pass an ancient trial and save your people.

It was supposed to be the end to your final quest together. You were at the finish line, the goal was in sight. But then it happened.

An ancient trial activated. Magical force fields trapped your party to the chamber. A show of devotion was required to leave. A man and a woman must have sex on the altar, in purposes of procreation.

Only problem? You were checking the perimeter outside the chamber when the trial started, getting left behind the force field, while your fiancée was inside, with another man.

There is only one way forward. Do you accept it?

I recommend using deepseek/proxy etc, yadda yadda yadda. You get the idea.

Alternate versions:

Netori - BullPOV

Vanilla ALT - Just you and Lily

Netori - FemPOV
creator: chungusmeister5661
